욥기 7:1.content: “Isn’t a man forced to labor on earth? Aren’t his days like the days of a hired hand?

욥기 7:2.content: As a servant who earnestly desires the shadow, as a hireling who looks for his wages,

욥기 7:3.content: so am I made to possess months of misery, wearisome nights are appointed to me.

욥기 7:4.content: When I lie down, I say, ‘When will I arise, and the night be gone?’ I toss and turn until the dawning of the day.

욥기 7:5.content: My flesh is clothed with worms and clods of dust. My skin closes up, and breaks out afresh.

욥기 7:6.content: My days are swifter than a weaver’s shuttle, and are spent without hope.

욥기 7:7.content: Oh remember that my life is a breath. My eye will no more see good.

욥기 7:8.content: The eye of him who sees me will see me no more. Your eyes will be on me, but I will not be.

욥기 7:9.content: As the cloud is consumed and vanishes away, so he who goes down to Sheol will come up no more.

욥기 7:10.content: He will return no more to his house, neither will his place know him any more.

욥기 7:11.content: “Therefore I will not keep silent. I will speak in the anguish of my spirit. I will complain in the bitterness of my soul.

욥기 7:12.content: Am I a sea, or a sea monster, that you put a guard over me?

욥기 7:13.content: When I say, ‘My bed will comfort me. My couch will ease my complaint;’

욥기 7:14.content: then you scare me with dreams, and terrify me through visions:

욥기 7:15.content: so that my soul chooses strangling, death rather than my bones.

욥기 7:16.content: I loathe my life. I don’t want to live forever. Leave me alone, for my days are but a breath.

욥기 7:17.content: What is man, that you should magnify him, that you should set your mind on him,

욥기 7:18.content: that you should visit him every morning, and test him every moment?

욥기 7:19.content: How long will you not look away from me, nor leave me alone until I swallow down my spittle?

욥기 7:20.content: If I have sinned, what do I do to you, you watcher of men? Why have you set me as a mark for you, so that I am a burden to myself?

욥기 7:21.content: Why do you not pardon my disobedience, and take away my iniquity? For now will I lie down in the dust. You will seek me diligently, but I will not be.”
